items.br: Fornece traducoes de tarefas alocadas em checklists, incluindo labels e URLs. Suporta operacoes multilingue em processos de onboarding e offboarding.
items.en: Provides translations of allocated checklist tasks, including labels and URLs. Supports multilingual operations in onboarding and offboarding processes.
items.es: Proporciona traducciones de tareas asignadas en checklists, incluyendo labels y URLs. Soporta operaciones multilingüe en procesos de onboarding y offboarding.
